title: Lead AI Engineer
company_focus: Agentic AI for loan servicing and collections
description:
At Prodigal, we are building AI Agents for loan servicing
and collections. Founded in 2018 by IITB alumni, our journey
began with one bold mission: to eradicate the inefficiencies
and confusion that have plagued the lending and collections
industry for decades. We are backed by Y Combinator, Accel
and Menlo Ventures.

Today, we stand at the forefront of a seismic shift in the
industry, building Agentic AI applications for consumer
finance. Powered by our cutting-edge platform, Prodigal’s
Intelligence Engine (PIE), we’re creating the next-
generation agentic workforce - one that empowers companies
to achieve unprecedented levels of operational excellence
and intelligence.

With over half a billion consumer finance interactions
processed and a growing impact on more than 100 leading
companies across North America, we’ve established ourselves
as the go-to partner for organizations that demand more from
their AI solutions. Our unparalleled experience, coupled
with our trusted customer relationships, uniquely positions
us to build Agentic AI applications that will revolutionize
the future of consumer finance.

At Prodigal, we are driven by a singular, unrelenting
purpose: to transform how consumer finance companies engage
with their customers and, in turn, drive successful outcomes
for all.

Lead AI Engineer About the Role

We're looking for a Tech Lead to own the technical direction
of proAgent's core architecture. You'll lead a small, high-
agency team building AI Agents that handle nuanced financial
conversations-where every millisecond of latency and every
reasoning decision matters.

This is a player-coach role. You'll write code, make
architectural decisions, and set the technical bar for how
we build intelligent, low-latency voice agents.

What You'll OwnAgent Loop & Reasoning

- Design the agentic runtime that powers natural, multi-turn
  conversations while executing complex business logic
  (payment negotiations, compliance guardrails, objection
  handling)
- Build primitives that balance conversational fluidity with
  structured reasoning-the agent needs to feel human while
  making verifiable decisions
- Create context management systems that track consumer state,
  conversation history, and business rules across long,
  branching dialogues

Voice AI Systems

- Architect our real-time voice pipeline for sub-1s latency
  across transcription, reasoning, and synthesis
- Own VAD tuning, and turn-taking logic that makes
  conversations feel natural
- Evaluate and integrate speech models (STT, TTS, speech-to-
  speech) as the landscape evolves-we currently work with
  ElevenLabs and Cartesia for Text to Speech, and Deepgram
  for Speech to Text, and are always exploring what's next
- Debug and optimize streaming audio and WebRTC

LLM Infrastructure

- Design our prompting, orchestration, and model routing
  strategies
- Build evaluation frameworks that measure agent quality
  beyond accuracy-conversation quality, empathy, compliance
  adherence
- Stay current on model capabilities and make pragmatic build-
  vs-integrate decisions

Technical Leadership

- Set architectural direction for proAgent platform and
  surrounding applications
- Mentor engineers and establish engineering practices that
  scale
- Partner with Product and Client teams to translate customer
  problems into technical roadmaps
- Make tradeoffs between shipping fast and building durable
  systems-we need both

What You Bring

- 4+ years building production systems, with 1+ years in a
  Lead for a project
- Hands-on work with LLMs in production: prompt engineering,
  orchestration, evaluation
- High bias for action to see things to production - real-time
  systems can get gnarly, and truly high bias is needed to
  take things to production
- Strong fundamentals in Python and TypeScript
- Clear technical communication-you can explain complex
  tradeoffs to engineers and stakeholders alike

Even Better

- Experience with voice AI: speech recognition, synthesis,
  telephony systems
- Background in fintech, lending, or collections
- Experience with Twilio, LiveKit, ElevenLabs, or similar
  real-time infrastructure
- You've built agentic systems that combine LLM reasoning with
  structured actions
- Track record of building and scaling small teams

Why This Role

- High leverage: proAgent is poised to handle millions of live
  consumer conversations every day. Your architectural
  decisions directly impact business outcomes.
- Frontier work: Voice AI that reasons, decides, and acts is
  one of the hardest problems in applied AI. We're building
  it.
- Ownership: Small team, big scope. You'll shape what proAgent
  becomes.

From day 1, Prodigal has been defined by talented, humble,
and hungry leaders and we want this mindset and culture to
continue to blossom from top to bottom in the company. If
you have an entrepreneurial spirit and want to work in a
fast-paced, intellectually-stimulating environment where you
will be pushed to grow, then please reach out because we are
looking to build a transformational company that reinvents
one of the biggest industries in the US.

To learn more about us - please visit the following:

Our Story - https://www.prodigaltech.com/our-story

What shapes our thinking -
https://link.prodigaltech.com/our-thesis

Our website - https://www.prodigaltech.com/
responsibilities: Design the agentic runtime that powers natural, multi-turn conversations while executing complex business logic
Build primitives that balance conversational fluidity with structured reasoning for human-like agent interactions
Create context management systems that track consumer state, conversation history, and business rules across long dialogues
Architect real-time voice pipeline for sub-1s latency across transcription, reasoning, and synthesis
Design prompting, orchestration, and model routing strategies for LLM infrastructure
Build evaluation frameworks that measure agent quality beyond accuracy including conversation quality, empathy, and compliance
Set architectural direction for proAgent platform and mentor engineers on engineering practices
Partner with Product and Client teams to translate customer problems into technical roadmaps
use_cases: AI agents for loan servicing and collections
Handling nuanced financial conversations with payment negotiations
Real-time voice agents for consumer finance interactions
Compliance-driven customer engagement with objection handling
Millions of daily live consumer conversations with automated reasoning
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on AI engineering role focused on building
AI agents that handle financial conversations. The role
involves directly working with LLMs, prompt engineering,
orchestration, model routing, and voice AI systems - all
core AI/ML development tasks rather than supporting
infrastructure.
